lines.en_lit: You speak of communal offerings? Communal offerings are different, in accordance with Rabbi Tavi said Rabbi Yoshiya. As Rabbi Tavi said Rabbi Yoshiya said the verse states: “This is the burnt-offering for every New Moon upon its renewal The Torah said: Renew and bring Me an offering from the new contribution.
well goat, bull what is there to say? a decree bull due to the goat.

due to a decree should die And furthermore, this that Rabbi Tavi said Rabbi Yoshiya is itself a mitzva As Rav Yehuda said Shmuel said: communal offerings that are brought on the first of Nisan, it is a mitzva to bring from the new if he brought from the old he has fulfilled but he lacked the mitzva,
Rather, Rabbi Zeira said because the lottery does not establish from year to another. But let us bring and draw lots It is a decree lest say the lottery establishes from year to another.
This well goat, bull what is there to say? a decree bull due to goat. due to a decree should die
The Rabbis stated before Abaye: a decree, due to a sin-offering whose owners have died, This well bull, goat, what is there to say? a decree goat due to the bull.
due to a decree should die Rather, a decree due to a sin-offering whose year has passed. a decree? It is a sin-offering whose year has passed,

This is not difficult, in accordance with Rabbi As it was taught a full year” he counts 365 days, in accordance with the number days solar year; the statement of Rabbi And the Rabbis say: He counts twelve months from day to day.
